summary: Comprehensive testing of Electrophysiology ABF analysis app completed. All backend APIs and major frontend features working correctly. Confirmed improved beat detection, per-minute analysis table, decreasing light intervals, X-axis in minutes, BF chart after validation, unvalidate functionality, and per-stim metrics with average row.

minor_issues.issue: Baseline BF returns None in some cases
minor_issues.impact: Light response metrics may not show baseline comparison

passed_tests: ✅ Backend /api/ root returns JSON with message: 'NeuroVoltage API'
✅ Backend /api/upload accepts ABF files and detects beats (1506 beats detected from 24MB file)
✅ Backend /api/detect-beats with improved filtering parameters works correctly
✅ Backend /api/compute-metrics computes NN/BF with artifact filtering
✅ Backend /api/per-minute-metrics returns per-minute BF, NN, NN_70 averages
✅ Backend /api/light-detect with decreasing intervals (60s→30s→20s→10s) working
✅ Backend /api/light-detect auto-detect from BF increase functional
✅ Backend /api/hrv-analysis computes sliding window HRV correctly
✅ Backend /api/light-hrv computes per-pulse HRV metrics
✅ Backend /api/light-response computes per-stim metrics with averages
✅ Backend export endpoints (CSV, XLSX, PDF) all functional
✅ Frontend loads with proper dark theme
✅ Frontend upload page works with ABF file upload
✅ Frontend trace viewer X-axis displays in minutes (confirmed 6 'min' labels)
✅ Frontend BF chart appears after validation (bpm vs min)
✅ Frontend unvalidate/reset button available after validation
✅ Frontend Analysis tab shows per-minute metrics table with BF, NN, NN_70 columns
✅ Frontend Light tab shows decreasing intervals (60s→30s→20s→10s) option
✅ Frontend Light tab shows per-stim table with average (AVG) row
✅ Frontend tab navigation works correctly (disabled until validation)
✅ Beat detection parameters (threshold, min distance, prominence, invert) all functional
✅ Light auto-detect from BF increase working in UI
✅ All main data flows from upload → detection → validation → analysis → light working

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All 13 API endpoints tested and working
success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All major features working, minor CSS selector issue in test script
